summary: Iteration 10 Testing Complete: Admin Orders Management Page. Backend: 17/17 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI tests passed. Orders page with status filters, search, expandable order details, status change dropdown, tracking panel, and pagination all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Admin orders endpoints properly migrated to Supabase with correct column mapping
Status filter tabs show correct counts from status_counts in API response
Order detail panel uses order.coupon_code and order.notes correctly (mapped from discount_code and customer_notes/admin_notes)
Tracking endpoint updates tracking_number (not tracking_code) in Supabase
Sidebar navigation has logical grouping: SHOP (Dashboard, Analytics, Bestellingen, Producten, Kortingscodes), MARKETING (E-mail Marketing, Email Templates, Reviews), SYSTEEM (Database)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing orders data in Supabase (88 orders total)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin orders management fully functional. Key endpoints: GET /api/admin/orders (with pagination, status filter, search), GET /api/admin/orders/{id} (detail with items), PUT /api/admin/orders/{id}/status (status change), POST /api/admin/orders/{id}/tracking (add tracking code). Frontend: AdminOrdersPage.jsx with data-testids for all interactive elements. Sidebar: AdminCommandCenterNew.jsx with grouped navigation (SHOP, MARKETING, SYSTEEM dividers).

endpoints_tested: GET /api/admin/orders - Returns paginated orders from Supabase
Total 88 orders with status_counts: pending=75, paid=1-2, shipped=4, cancelled=8
Returns: order (customer info, payment info, shipping), items array
Valid statuses: pending, paid, shipped, delivered, cancelled
Updates tracking_number column and sets status to shipped
Optionally sends tracking email to customer

elements_tested: data-testid='filter-all', filter-pending, filter-paid, filter-shipped, filter-delivered, filter-cancelled
data-testid='ship-btn-{id}' - Verzenden button for paid orders

sections_verified: Producten - Shows order items with quantity, price, total
Betaling & Verzending - Shows payment method, created_at, shipped_at, coupon info

elements_verified: Verzendservice dropdown (PostNL, DHL, DPD, GLS, bpost)

sections_verified: SHOP section: Live Dashboard, Analytics, Bestellingen, Producten, Kortingscodes
MARKETING section: E-mail Marketing, Email Templates, Reviews

pagination.details: 88 orders total, 25 per page, 4 pages. Navigation between pages works correctly.
